interfaces {
    dummy dum100 {
        address "192.168.42.1/32"
        description "Loopback in VRF1"
        vrf "VRF1"
    }
    ethernet eth0 {
        address "172.20.20.202/24"
        address "3fff:172:20:20::7/64"
        description "Management Interface"
    }
    ethernet eth1 {
        address "10.1.1.9/30"
        vrf "VRF1"
    }
    ethernet eth2 {
        address "10.1.1.13/30"
        vrf "VRF1"
    }
    loopback lo {
    }
}
pki {
    ca clab {
        certificate ""
    }
    certificate self {
        certificate ""
        private {
            key ""
        }
    }
}
service {
    https {
        api {
            keys {
                id API1 {
                    key "secretkey"
                }
                id admin {
                    key "admin"
                }
            }
            rest {
            }
        }
        certificates {
            ca-certificate "clab"
            certificate "self"
        }
        listen-address "0.0.0.0"
        port "443"
    }
    ntp {
        allow-client {
            address "127.0.0.0/8"
            address "169.254.0.0/16"
            address "10.0.0.0/8"
            address "172.16.0.0/12"
            address "192.168.0.0/16"
            address "::1/128"
            address "fe80::/10"
            address "fc00::/7"
        }
        server 172.20.20.1 {
            prefer
        }
        server time1.vyos.net {
        }
        server time2.vyos.net {
        }
        server time3.vyos.net {
        }
    }
    ssh {
        listen-address "0.0.0.0"
    }
}
system {
    config-management {
        commit-revisions "100"
    }
    host-name "A2V"
    login {
        user admin {
            authentication {
                encrypted-password "$6$rounds=656000$NrYSAkJQ3aF.iL9K$RWJRNFonDx51LHoT.s0X2pPsXhyhscsaNwtdUp0f8kypqzmyrald26bUbGAmnDChR1rkY5biABmg0w0IbSnyd/"
            }
        }
    }
    syslog {
        local {
            facility all {
                level "info"
            }
            facility local7 {
                level "debug"
            }
        }
        remote 172.20.20.1 {
            facility local7 {
                level "info"
            }
            format {
                include-timezone
            }
        }
    }
}
vrf {
    name VRF1 {
        protocols {
            ospf {
                area 1 {
                    area-type {
                        stub {
                        }
                    }
                    network "10.1.1.8/30"
                    network "10.1.1.12/30"
                    network "192.168.42.1/32"
                }
                interface dum100 {
                    passive {
                    }
                }
                parameters {
                    router-id "2.2.2.2"
                }
            }
        }
        table "100"
    }
}
